traceability_rows.trace_rule: approved closure subject hash is the upstream eligibility boundary
traceability_rows.test_obligation: candidate-check with review decision must pass

traceability_rows.trace_rule: natural language is primary semantic rail
traceability_rows.test_obligation: inventory semantic_source_model must declare index_and_verification_skeleton role

traceability_rows.source: interaction graph nodes and terminal states
traceability_rows.trace_rule: eligible nodes map to PAGE, STATE, UI_ELEMENT, or blocked gap
traceability_rows.test_obligation: no eligible closure node is unmapped

traceability_rows.trace_rule: eligible clickables map to CTA, NAVIGATION, INPUT, or UI_ELEMENT and retain reaction refs

traceability_rows.source: async, failure, disabled, terminal, overlay, and handoff messages
traceability_rows.trace_rule: required same-task messages and recovery surfaces are deductible only with inference evidence
traceability_rows.test_obligation: canonical derived message or recovery element uses DEDUCTIVE_PRIMARY

traceability_rows.trace_rule: missing input has acquisition_path or gap_ref
traceability_rows.test_obligation: input obligation without path or gap is rejected

traceability_rows.source: missing child surface or page hierarchy ambiguity
traceability_rows.trace_rule: page-only or flow-only source cannot silently create child surfaces
traceability_rows.test_obligation: structural review cannot become canonical before Human Gate approval

traceability_rows.trace_rule: new capability, integration, data scope, role, permission, workflow, page family, or business promise blocks downstream consumption
traceability_rows.test_obligation: open gap names blocked downstream artifacts

traceability_rows.trace_rule: downstream workpacks consume only ids included by canonical_projection_rule and may not invent elements
traceability_rows.test_obligation: unknown or projection-excluded downstream element refs are rejected
